# Complete PF2e Archetypes List (Archives of Nethys)

> **Note:** Categories are based on the 10 AoN tab filters (Artifact, Class, Combat Style, Core, Faction, Multiclass, Mystical, Mythic, Profession, Undead). AoN uses client-side JavaScript filtering, so exact category assignments below are based on archetype themes, prerequisites, and source context. Some archetypes may be categorized slightly differently on AoN.
>
> **[L]** = Legacy content | Rarity noted where not Common.

---

## MULTICLASS (27)

One multiclass dedication archetype per PF2e class.

| # | Archetype | Source |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | Alchemist | Player Core |
| 2 | Animist | War of Immortals |
| 3 | Barbarian | Player Core |
| 4 | Bard | Player Core |
| 5 | Champion | Player Core |
| 6 | Cleric | Player Core |
| 7 | Commander | War of Immortals |
| 8 | Druid | Player Core |
| 9 | Exemplar | War of Immortals |
| 10 | Fighter | Player Core |
| 11 | Guardian | War of Immortals |
| 12 | Gunslinger | Guns & Gears |
| 13 | Inventor | Guns & Gears |
| 14 | Investigator | Player Core 2 |
| 15 | Kineticist | Rage of Elements |
| 16 | Magus | Secrets of Magic |
| 17 | Monk | Player Core |
| 18 | Oracle | Player Core |
| 19 | Psychic | Dark Archives |
| 20 | Ranger | Player Core |
| 21 | Rogue | Player Core |
| 22 | Sorcerer | Player Core |
| 23 | Summoner | Secrets of Magic |
| 24 | Swashbuckler | Player Core 2 |
| 25 | Thaumaturge | Dark Archives |
| 26 | Witch | Player Core |
| 27 | Wizard | Player Core |

## ARTIFACT (6)

Archetype artifacts from War of Immortals — unique archetypes tied to specific powerful artifact items. All Rare.

| # | Archetype | Source | Rarity |
|---|-----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Gelid Shard | War of Immortals | Rare |
| 2 | Provocator | War of Immortals | Rare |
| 3 | Sixth Pillar | War of Immortals | Rare |
| 4 | Splinter of Finality | War of Immortals | Rare |
| 5 | Ursine Avenger Hood | War of Immortals | Rare |
| 6 | Venture-Gossip | War of Immortals | Rare |

---

## MYTHIC (1)

Mythic archetypes from War of Immortals, tied to the mythic rules subsystem.

| # | Archetype | Source | Rarity |
|---|-----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Warrior of Legend | War of Immortals pg. 66 | Uncommon |

> Note: Mythic Destinies are a separate subsystem on AoN and are listed under MythicDestinies, not as standard archetypes. Warrior of Legend is the main mythic archetype listed in the archetype page.

---

## UNDEAD (7)

Undead transformation archetypes from Book of the Dead. All Legacy, Rare.

| # | Archetype | Source | Rarity |
|---|-----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Ghost | Book of the Dead pg. 44 | Rare [L] |
| 2 | Ghoul | Book of the Dead pg. 47 | Rare [L] |

| 4 | Mummy | Book of the Dead pg. 52 | Rare [L] |
| 5 | Skeleton | Book of the Dead pg. 54 | Rare [L] |
| 6 | Vampire | Book of the Dead pg. 58 | Rare [L] |
| 7 | Zombie | Book of the Dead pg. 60 | Rare [L] |

Archetypes that extend or modify specific class features (not multiclass dedications).

| 3 | Captain | Battlecry! pg. 82 | Uncommon | — |

| 7 | Necrologist | Battlecry! pg. 66 | Rare | Spellcaster |
| 8 | Spellshot | Guns & Gears pg. 140 | Uncommon | Gunslinger (way) |
| 9 | Vindicator | War of Immortals pg. 64 | Common | Ranger (hunter's edge) |
| 10 | War Mage | Battlecry! pg. 68 | Uncommon | Spellcaster |

## SUMMARY

| Category | Count | Primary Sources |
|----------|-------|-----------------|
| Multiclass | 27 | Player Core, Player Core 2, War of Immortals, Guns & Gears, Secrets of Magic, Rage of Elements, Dark Archives |
| Core | 32 | Player Core 2 |
| Artifact | 6 | War of Immortals |
| Mythic | 1 | War of Immortals |
| Undead | 7 | Book of the Dead |
| Class | 10 | Battlecry!, Divine Mysteries, Tian Xia CG, Rival Academies, Guns & Gears, War of Immortals |
| Combat Style | ~20 | Guns & Gears, Howl of the Wild, Tian Xia CG, Draconic Codex, Battlecry! |
| Faction | ~25 | World Guide, Character Guide, Shining Kingdoms, Divine Mysteries, various APs |
| Mystical | ~27 | Secrets of Magic, Dark Archives, Book of the Dead, Rage of Elements, APG |
| Profession | ~30 | Various Adventure Paths, APG, Guns & Gears, World Guide |
| **TOTAL** | **~185** | |

## SOURCE BOOK ABBREVIATIONS

| Abbreviation | Full Title |
|-------------|-----------|
| APG | Advanced Player's Guide |
| BotD | Book of the Dead |
| CG | Character Guide (Lost Omens) |
| DA | Dark Archives |
| G&G | Guns & Gears |
| HotW | Howl of the Wild |
| PC | Player Core |
| PC2 | Player Core 2 |
| PF#NNN | Pathfinder Adventure Path issue number |
| RoE | Rage of Elements |
| SoM | Secrets of Magic |
| WG | World Guide (Lost Omens) |
| WoI | War of Immortals |

*Compiled from Archives of Nethys (2e.aonprd.com/Archetypes.aspx). Some category assignments are approximate — AoN uses client-side JavaScript filtering that cannot be scraped directly. Verify individual archetype categories on AoN if exact placement is needed.*
